title: Sonnet 5 is LIVE And It Competes With Opus
summary: Claude Sonnet 5 is a new release from Anthropic that represents a significant upgrade to the Sonnet series. The video reviews benchmarks showing Sonnet 5 performs close to Claude Opus 4.8, and discusses whether these benchmarks translate to real-world task performance.
writeup: The video covers Anthropic's Claude Sonnet 5, framed as a significant upgrade to the Sonnet line. It walks through benchmarks indicating Sonnet 5 performs close to Claude Opus 4.8, and it raises the question of whether those benchmark results carry over to real-world task performance. The takeaway is that a mid-tier Sonnet model now approaches Opus-level scores, with the caveat that evaluation numbers may not fully reflect practical use.
